overview.description: Johnson & Johnson, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of a range of products in the healthcare field worldwide. It operates in two segments, Innovative Medicine and MedTech. The Innovative Medicine segment offers products for various therapeutic areas, such as oncology, immunology, neuroscience, pulmonary hypertension, infectious diseases, and cardiovascular and metabolism distributed through retailers, wholesalers, distributors, hospitals, and healthcare professionals for prescription...
overview.financialIntro: In 2025, Johnson & Johnson's revenue was $94.19 billion, an increase of 6.05% compared to the previous year's $88.82 billion. Earnings were $26.80 billion, an increase of 90.56%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 24 analysts, the average rating for JNJ stock is "Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $252.87, which is an increase of 7.97% from the latest price.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson Transcript: Goldman Sachs 47th Annual Global Healthcare Conference 2026
data.text: Strong growth continues with double-digit gains across key products and new launches in immunology and oncology. TREMFYA and ICOTYDE drive immunology momentum, while RYBREVANT, ERLEADA, and INLEXZO expand oncology opportunities. Neuroscience and cardiovascular assets show robust progress.

data.title: Trouble Ahead For GLP-1 Drugs As Health Plans Stop Paying
data.text: More employers and health plans are balking at paying for costly GLP-1 drugs like Ozempic, Zepbound and Wegovy for weight loss and the treatment of obesity, according to a new report.
